REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE A SOLE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS ASSERTING FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS, REGARDING SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS CAUSED BY DEFENDANT. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. NO OPPOSITION FOR A NEW CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF HAS 14 DAYS TO FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kaitlyn Murphy, 415.554.3867 for Defendant the City and County of San Francisco.
Elaine Videa, 510.820.4858 for Plaintiff Lieu Luong.

Plaintiff requests leave to amend the complaint. The Defendant does not object.

Discussed. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained for Plaintiff to allege a sole cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress asserting facts, not conclusions, regarding severe emotional distress caused by Defendant. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. No opposition for a new cause of action. Plaintiff has 14 days to file a second amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elaine Videa (510-820-4858) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Lieu Luong.
Kaitlyn Murphy (415-554-3867) for Defendant/Moving party CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
